history.content:
<thought>
The cell directly in front of me (D06) is lava, so I cannot move forward. To my left (C07) is a wall, so I cannot go that way. The only safe adjacent cell is to my right (E07), which is a floor. I am currently facing north, so I will turn right to face east and then be able to move onto that safe cell in the next step.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly in front of me (D06) is floor, so moving forward is safe. I am facing north, so I will move forward to explore further.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 7, column D, facing up. The cell in front (row 6, D) is lava (L), left (row 7, C) is lava, right (row 7, E) is a wall. I cannot move forward. The only safe direction is behind me (south), but I cannot see it. I need to turn around to go back the way I came. I will turn right twice to face south, but first I turn right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
Now facing east. The cell directly ahead (row 7, column E) is a floor (.), which is safe. I can move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The observation appears unchanged, showing my position at row 7, column D facing east. The cell directly ahead (row 7, column E) is a floor (.), which is safe. I will move forward again to continue exploring east.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The observation still shows my position at row 7, column D, facing east. The cell ahead (row 7, column E) is floor, so moving forward is safe. I will attempt to move forward again to proceed east.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The current observation still shows me at row 7, column D, facing east. The cell directly ahead (row 7, column E) is floor (`.`), which is safe. I will move forward to advance eastward along this corridor.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am still at row 7, column D, facing east. The cell directly ahead (E7) is floor, which is safe to enter. I will move forward to advance eastward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at row 7, column D, facing north (indicated by `^`). The cell directly ahead (D6) is a wall (`#`), so I cannot move forward. The cells to the left (C7) and right (E7) are both floor. Since the goal is not yet visible, I will turn right to face east and explore that direction.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at (07,D) facing north. Forward is floor (06,D) but that leads to a dead end (walls north, east lava, west wall). East is lava, west is wall. The only unexplored direction is south (behind). I will turn around to face south, starting by turning right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at (07,D) facing east. The cell in front (07,E) is floor, and the cells ahead (07,F) is also floor. There is no immediate danger. I will move forward to explore further.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
